NAME: CA177157
WOD_2__COMMENTS__C:
Serial # 12201595_x000D_
Came across this meter and noticed it saying Batt End. Guessing that means battery near end of life. I put in a new battery and when powering back on, she showed empty pipe, some other fault that I wasn't quick enough to catch, then settled back on Batt End. This meter was wired so it had 12VDC supply voltage. Also looking at the ACFT reading, seems like this meter has not worked for a while. Since this meter is wired to the pivot panel. I looked up historical readings and seen it hasn't clocked a flow this water year. Last flow reading I seen on it was from 8/31/24. When swapping out with a new meter today. I noticed one of the three metal pins sticking out of the bottom missing with signs of corrosion around where pin should be.

failed AgSense number 260072_x000D_
